title: F1 2016 Boat
description: This is a Formula 1 2016 texturepack by AdamixGaming, NotGatoz  and Jerpix | required OptiFine!!!
body:
If you want to appreciate our work, you will find links to our buycoffees in the "License" file in the texturepack.

Mercedes Safety Car
  
    All boat with chest (with bamboo raft)
  
    No command is needed to spawn the Safety Car

oak_boat

    Ferrari 5,7
    Sauber 9,12

spruce_boat

    Toro Rosso 26,55
    Haas 8,21

birch_boat

    Renault 20,30

jungle_boat

    RedBull 33,3

acacia_boat

    Mclaren 14,22

dark_oak_boat

    MercedesAMG 6,44

cherry_boat

    Force India 11,27

mangrove_boat

    Williams 19,77

bamboo_raft

    MRT 94,88

**How to specify**

    Fixed version only

/summon boat ~ ~ ~ {Type:"<oak | spruce | birch | jungle | acacia | dark_oak | cherry | mangrove | bamboo>",CustomName:"\"<car number>_<soft | medium | hard | intermediate | wet>\""}

Example

/summon boat ~ ~ ~ {Type:"spruce",CustomName:"\"26_hard\""}
